channel.title: scp on Writing about past times
channel.description: Recent content in scp on Writing about past times

item.title: SCP 的一个坑
item.description: scp SPARK2-2.3.0.cloudera2-1.cdh5.13.3.p0.316101-el7.parcel root@bigdata3:/opt/cloudera/parcel-repo 会把 parcel-repo 目录给覆盖了！复制整个目录： scp -r /opt/cloudera/parcel-repo root@bigdata3:/opt/cloudera/
